excluded_ground_truth_errors.20: Bar chart: smallest two bars 9.29%+12.51%=21.80% > largest 21.37%, so 'Yes' is correct; gold 'No' is wrong.
excluded_ground_truth_errors.50: Food web: arrow runs predatory insects -> large roach (roach eat insects); fewer roach => insects increase. Model 'increase' correct; gold 'decrease' wrong.
